title: TruthHire: A Shared Intelligence Network for Employment-Experience Fraud — Reference Implementation and Evaluation Harness
description: Open-source reference implementation and reproducible evaluation harness for the framework paper 'A Shared Intelligence Network for Employment-Experience Fraud: Privacy-Preserving Signal Sharing and Incentive Design.' Includes a deterministic timeline-impossibility detection engine with tests; seeded, reproducible dataset generation with provenance hashing; fraud-injection, evaluation, incentive-mechanism, re-identification, AI-fabrication, network-flywheel, and fraud-ring experiments with parameter sweeps; figure-generation scripts; and a download script for external public corpora (KARRIEREWEGE, ResumeAtlas, Kaggle). All randomized results use a fixed master seed and report 95% confidence intervals.
